title: Ku'Bakai
content:
{{Top|canon=Ku'Baku}} {{Star |image=[[File:KuBakai.png]] |name=Ku'Bakai |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of grid square T-9 in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]]. |sector=[[Calaron sector/Legends|Calaron sector]] |system=[[Ku'Bakai system/Legends|Ku'Bakai system]] |coordinates=T-9 |xyz= |routes= |distance= |orbits= |stations= |asteroids= |other= |class=Blue giant |diameter= }} {{Quote|We're going to Kubindi.''"
"''Not much is known about that planet. Lots of solar flares, and I hear the wildlife can be pretty rough.''"
"''Solar flares, oh my! I'm sure they'll wreak havoc on my circuitry.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]''}} '''Ku'Bakai''' was the [[Ku'Bakai system/Legends|Ku'Bakai system's]] primary [[Star/Legends|star]]. It was a [[Blue giant/Legends|blue giant]] star that shot out powerful [[Solar flare/Legends|solar flares]] at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Onslaught]]'' {{Mo}} *[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]'' *[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races'', Second Edition]] *[[Star Wars Screen Entertainment|''Star Wars'' Screen Entertainment]] *{{JournalCite|10|A Free-Trader's Guide to the Planets}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ===Non-canon sources=== *{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}} {{Un}} {{ID|Ka'Bakai}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Ku'Bakai }} [[Category:Blue giants]] [[Category:Ku'Bakai system locations]] [[Category:Stars in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Stars in the Slice]]
